codeReview.summary: Created 14 comprehensive tests for the Breadcrumbs component covering all rendering scenarios: navigation path, items, titles, links for non-last items, page for last item, separators, empty arrays, single items, href attributes, special characters, and URL-encoded hrefs. Tests pass successfully (14 breadcrumbs tests, all 320 tests in suite pass). TypeScript and lint checks pass.

issues.description: Duplicate test case: 'renders nothing when breadcrumbs is not provided' (line 95) and 'renders nothing when breadcrumbs array is empty' (line 88) both test empty array rendering. Consider removing one or renaming for clarity.

Misleading test name: 'renders nothing when breadcrumbs is not provided' suggests testing undefined input, but the test actually tests empty array. The comment explains the behavior, but the name could be clearer.

summary: The Breadcrumbs component tests are well-implemented with comprehensive coverage of all expected behaviors including navigation path rendering, links, pages, separators, and edge cases. Two minor issues identified: a duplicate test case and a misleading test name, but both are non-blocking. All tests pass, typecheck passes, and lint passes.
